question: What is the total balance across all active accounts?
sql: SELECT SUM(balance) AS total_balance FROM accounts WHERE status = 'active';

question: How many accounts does each customer have?
sql: SELECT c.full_name, COUNT(a.id) AS account_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN accounts a ON c.id = a.customer_id GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name ORDER BY account_count DESC;

question: Show all frozen accounts with customer names and balances
sql: SELECT a.account_number, c.full_name, a.balance, a.currency FROM accounts a JOIN customers c ON a.customer_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'frozen' ORDER BY a.balance DESC;

question: Which branch has the most customers?
sql: SELECT b.name AS branch, b.city, COUNT(c.id) AS customer_count FROM branches b LEFT JOIN customers c ON b.id = c.branch_id GROUP BY b.id, b.name, b.city ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the average account balance per account type?
sql: SELECT at.name AS account_type, AVG(a.balance) AS avg_balance, COUNT(a.id) AS num_accounts FROM account_types at JOIN accounts a ON at.id = a.account_type_id GROUP BY at.id, at.name ORDER BY avg_balance DESC;

question: Show all customers from Cairo with their email and phone
sql: SELECT full_name, email, phone, city FROM customers WHERE city = 'Cairo' AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY full_name;

question: Which relationship managers are assigned the most customers?
sql: SELECT e.full_name AS manager, e.role, COUNT(c.id) AS customer_count FROM employees e JOIN customers c ON e.id = c.relationship_manager_id GROUP BY e.id, e.full_name, e.role ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 10;

question: What is the average salary per employee role?
sql: SELECT role, AVG(salary) AS avg_salary, COUNT(id) AS employee_count FROM employees WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY role ORDER BY avg_salary DESC;

question: Show all active branch managers with their branch city
sql: SELECT e.full_name, e.role, b.name AS branch, b.city FROM employees e JOIN branches b ON e.branch_id = b.id WHERE e.role = 'Branch Manager' AND e.is_active = 1;

question: Which branch has the highest total employee salary?
sql: SELECT b.name AS branch, b.city, SUM(e.salary) AS total_salary FROM branches b JOIN employees e ON b.id = e.branch_id WHERE e.is_active = 1 GROUP BY b.id, b.name, b.city ORDER BY total_salary DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total transaction amount per channel?
sql: SELECT channel, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(id) AS tx_count FROM transactions WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY channel ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

question: Show the top 5 accounts by total debit transaction amount
sql: SELECT a.account_number, c.full_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_debits FROM transactions t JOIN accounts a ON t.account_id = a.id JOIN customers c ON a.customer_id = c.id WHERE t.direction = 'debit' AND t.status = 'completed' GROUP BY a.id, a.account_number, c.full_name ORDER BY total_debits DESC LIMIT 5;

question: How many transactions were linked to a loan?
sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS loan_linked_transactions, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM transactions WHERE loan_id IS NOT NULL AND status = 'completed';

question: Show all failed transactions in March 2025 with account numbers
sql: SELECT t.reference_no, a.account_number, t.amount, t.description, t.transaction_date FROM transactions t JOIN accounts a ON t.account_id = a.id WHERE t.status = 'failed' AND t.transaction_date LIKE '2025-03%' ORDER BY t.transaction_date DESC;

question: What is the daily transaction volume for the last 7 days?
sql: SELECT transaction_date, COUNT(id) AS tx_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM transactions WHERE status = 'completed' AND transaction_date >= DATE('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY transaction_date ORDER BY transaction_date DESC;

question: What is the total outstanding loan balance per loan type?
sql: SELECT lt.name AS loan_type, COUNT(l.id) AS loan_count, SUM(l.outstanding_balance) AS total_outstanding FROM loan_types lt JOIN loans l ON lt.id = l.loan_type_id WHERE l.status = 'active' GROUP BY lt.id, lt.name ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC;

question: Which customers have more than one active loan?
sql: SELECT c.full_name, c.email, COUNT(l.id) AS active_loans FROM customers c JOIN loans l ON c.id = l.customer_id WHERE l.status = 'active' GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name, c.email HAVING COUNT(l.id) > 1 ORDER BY active_loans DESC;

question: Show all defaulted loans with customer name and outstanding balance
sql: SELECT c.full_name, c.email, l.principal, l.outstanding_balance, l.disbursement_date FROM loans l JOIN customers c ON l.customer_id = c.id WHERE l.status = 'defaulted' ORDER BY l.outstanding_balance DESC;

question: Which branch originated the most loans?
sql: SELECT b.name AS branch, b.city, COUNT(l.id) AS loan_count, SUM(l.principal) AS total_principal FROM branches b JOIN loans l ON b.id = l.branch_id GROUP BY b.id, b.name, b.city ORDER BY loan_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Show late loan payments with customer names and days late
sql: SELECT c.full_name, lp.amount_paid, lp.payment_date, lp.days_late, lp.payment_method FROM loan_payments lp JOIN loans l ON lp.loan_id = l.id JOIN customers c ON l.customer_id = c.id WHERE lp.status = 'late' ORDER BY lp.days_late DESC LIMIT 20;

question: What account did each loan disburse funds into?
sql: SELECT l.id AS loan_id, c.full_name, a.account_number, l.principal, l.disbursement_date FROM loans l JOIN customers c ON l.customer_id = c.id JOIN accounts a ON l.disbursement_account_id = a.id ORDER BY l.disbursement_date DESC LIMIT 20;

question: What is the total portfolio value per risk profile?
sql: SELECT risk_profile, COUNT(id) AS portfolio_count, SUM(total_value) AS total_aum FROM portfolios WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY risk_profile ORDER BY total_aum DESC;

question: Which customers have the largest portfolio value?
sql: SELECT c.full_name, SUM(p.total_value) AS total_portfolio_value FROM customers c JOIN portfolios p ON c.id = p.customer_id WHERE p.is_active = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name ORDER BY total_portfolio_value DESC LIMIT 10;

question: What asset class has the highest unrealized profit across all portfolios?
sql: SELECT a.asset_class, SUM(ph.unrealized_pnl) AS total_pnl FROM portfolio_holdings ph JOIN assets a ON ph.asset_id = a.id GROUP BY a.asset_class ORDER BY total_pnl DESC;

question: Show the most held assets by number of portfolios
sql: SELECT a.symbol, a.name, a.asset_class, COUNT(ph.portfolio_id) AS portfolio_count FROM assets a JOIN portfolio_holdings ph ON a.id = ph.asset_id GROUP BY a.id, a.symbol, a.name, a.asset_class ORDER BY portfolio_count DESC LIMIT 10;

question: What is the latest market price for each asset?
sql: SELECT a.symbol, a.name, mp.price, mp.price_date, mp.change_pct FROM assets a JOIN market_prices mp ON a.id = mp.asset_id WHERE mp.price_date = (SELECT MAX(price_date) FROM market_prices WHERE asset_id = a.id) ORDER BY a.symbol;

question: How many customers have each KYC status?
sql: SELECT kyc_status, COUNT(id) AS customer_count FROM kyc_records GROUP BY kyc_status ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

question: Show all customers with expired KYC and their email
sql: SELECT c.full_name, c.email, k.expiry_date, k.document_type FROM kyc_records k JOIN customers c ON k.customer_id = c.id WHERE k.kyc_status = 'expired' ORDER BY k.expiry_date ASC;

question: Which customers have a pending KYC and an active loan?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.full_name, c.email, k.kyc_status, l.status AS loan_status FROM customers c JOIN kyc_records k ON c.id = k.customer_id JOIN loans l ON c.id = l.customer_id WHERE k.kyc_status = 'pending' AND l.status = 'active';

question: What is the average credit score per risk tier?
sql: SELECT risk_tier, AVG(credit_score) AS avg_score, AVG(default_probability) AS avg_default_prob, COUNT(id) AS assessment_count FROM risk_assessments GROUP BY risk_tier ORDER BY avg_score DESC;

question: Show customers with very high risk tier and active loans
sql: SELECT c.full_name, c.email, ra.credit_score, ra.risk_tier, ra.default_probability, l.outstanding_balance FROM risk_assessments ra JOIN customers c ON ra.customer_id = c.id JOIN loans l ON ra.loan_id = l.id WHERE ra.risk_tier = 'Very High' AND l.status = 'active' ORDER BY ra.default_probability DESC;

question: How many risk assessments were triggered by a loan application?
sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS loan_triggered, AVG(credit_score) AS avg_score FROM risk_assessments WHERE loan_id IS NOT NULL;

question: Show each customer with their relationship manager name and branch
sql: SELECT c.full_name AS customer, e.full_name AS relationship_manager, b.name AS branch, b.city FROM customers c JOIN employees e ON c.relationship_manager_id = e.id JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.id WHERE c.is_active = 1 ORDER BY b.city, c.full_name LIMIT 30;

question: Which customers have both an active loan and a frozen account?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.full_name, c.email, c.city FROM customers c JOIN loans l ON c.id = l.customer_id JOIN accounts a ON c.id = a.customer_id WHERE l.status = 'active' AND a.status = 'frozen';

question: Show portfolio funding accounts with current balance and portfolio value
sql: SELECT c.full_name, p.name AS portfolio, p.total_value, a.account_number, a.balance AS funding_account_balance FROM portfolios p JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id JOIN accounts a ON p.funding_account_id = a.id WHERE p.is_active = 1 ORDER BY p.total_value DESC LIMIT 20;

sql: SELECT c.full_name, COUNT(a.id) AS account_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN accounts a ON c.id = a.customer_id GROUP BY c.id, c.full_name ORDER BY account_count DESC;

sql: SELECT a.account_number, c.full_name, a.balance, a.currency FROM accounts a JOIN customers c ON a.customer_id = c.id WHERE a.status = 'frozen' ORDER BY a.balance DESC;

sql: SELECT b.name AS branch, b.city, COUNT(c.id) AS customer_count FROM branches b LEFT JOIN customers c ON b.id = c.branch_id GROUP BY b.id, b.name, b.city ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 1;

sql: SELECT kyc_status, COUNT(id) AS customer_count FROM kyc_records GROUP BY kyc_status ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

sql: SELECT c.full_name, c.email, k.expiry_date, k.document_type FROM kyc_records k JOIN customers c ON k.customer_id = c.id WHERE k.kyc_status = 'expired' ORDER BY k.expiry_date ASC;

question: What is the average credit score per risk tier?
sql: SELECT risk_tier, AVG(credit_score) AS avg_score, AVG(default_probability) AS avg_default_prob, COUNT(id) AS assessment_count FROM risk_assessments GROUP BY risk_tier ORDER BY avg_score DESC;

sql: SELECT c.full_name, c.email, ra.credit_score, ra.risk_tier, ra.default_probability, l.outstanding_balance FROM risk_assessments ra JOIN customers c ON ra.customer_id = c.id JOIN loans l ON ra.loan_id = l.id WHERE ra.risk_tier = 'Very High' AND l.status = 'active' ORDER BY ra.default_probability DESC;

question: How many risk assessments were triggered by a loan application?
sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS loan_triggered, AVG(credit_score) AS avg_score FROM risk_assessments WHERE loan_id IS NOT NULL;

question: Show each customer with their relationship manager name and branch
sql: SELECT c.full_name AS customer, e.full_name AS relationship_manager, b.name AS branch, b.city FROM customers c JOIN employees e ON c.relationship_manager_id = e.id JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.id WHERE c.is_active = 1 ORDER BY b.city, c.full_name LIMIT 30;

question: Which customers have both an active loan and a frozen account?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.full_name, c.email, c.city FROM customers c JOIN loans l ON c.id = l.customer_id JOIN accounts a ON c.id = a.customer_id WHERE l.status = 'active' AND a.status = 'frozen';

question: Show portfolio funding accounts with current balance and portfolio value
sql: SELECT c.full_name, p.name AS portfolio, p.total_value, a.account_number, a.balance AS funding_account_balance FROM portfolios p JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id JOIN accounts a ON p.funding_account_id = a.id WHERE p.is_active = 1 ORDER BY p.total_value DESC LIMIT 20;
